allow: Bash(python -c "import os,sys; sys.path.insert\(0,''python-engine''\); os.environ[''DEV_MODE'']=''1''; from src.core.tts_engine import tts_engine; b=tts_engine.preview\(''测试试听'', ''voice_male_01''\); print\(''bytes'', len\(b\)\); import struct; import wave, io; w=wave.open\(io.BytesIO\(b\),''rb''\); print\(''wav'', w.getnchannels\(\), w.getframerate\(\), w.getsampwidth\(\), w.getnframes\(\)\); frames=w.readframes\(min\(10000,w.getnframes\(\)\)\); mx=max\(abs\(struct.unpack\(''<%dh''%\(len\(frames\)//2\), frames\)\)\); print\(''max_abs_sample'', mx\)")

Bash(python -c "import os,sys,io,wave,struct; sys.path.insert\(0,''python-engine''\); os.environ[''DEV_MODE'']=''1''; from src.core.tts_engine import tts_engine; b=tts_engine.preview\(''测试试听'', ''voice_male_01''\); print\(''bytes'', len\(b\)\); w=wave.open\(io.BytesIO\(b\),''rb''\); print\(''wav'', w.getnchannels\(\), w.getframerate\(\), w.getsampwidth\(\), w.getnframes\(\)\); frames=w.readframes\(min\(24000,w.getnframes\(\)\)\); samples=struct.unpack\(''<%dh''%\(len\(frames\)//2\), frames\); mx=max\(abs\(s\) for s in samples\); print\(''max_abs_sample'', mx\)")
